pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh specify this exact output path.
setup_jasp.sh script copies the downloaded file to this exact path.
Downloaded the actual CSV from the JASP repository and verified the column headers match these variables exactly.
verifier.py implements this exact scoring logic for each component of the analysis.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset is the real Big Five Personality Traits dataset from the official JASP repository. It is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv. The expected variables for PCA (Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, Openness) are exactly the columns present in the dataset. The task requires saving the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFive_PCA.jasp, and the grading rubric checks for file creation, valid zip format, PCA analysis, correct variables, varimax rotation, scree plot, and path diagram.
